steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage notes that the map revealed a magnetic field with no clear pattern or direction.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: C states that the magnetic field wasn't uniform, which matches the description of having no clear pattern or direction. The other choices either suggest accuracy, similarity to other bones, or weakness, none of which are mentioned. That matches choice C — C is correct.
